overview: InfiniT Men's Health delivers personalized testosterone replacement therapy through a needle-free spray formulation using proprietary HypoSpray Technology. Care is provided by licensed providers via in-person visits or telehealth, with medications dispensed by an FDA-regulated pharmacy and delivered directly to patients.
highlights: Needle-free testosterone spray with proprietary HypoSpray Technology
In-person and telehealth consultations with licensed providers
Monthly subscription includes hormone testing, medication delivery with free discreet shipping, and provider access
targetAudience: Men experiencing age-related testosterone decline seeking convenient hormone replacement therapy without injections or pills.
